title: Config
description: The schema for the config.json file

$schema.description: Just used to stop VSCode being angry.

appOwnerUsername.description: The username of the bot owner.

appOwnerId.description: The ID of the bot owner.

database.description: Properties and options of the database (MySQL only) to use. See https://sequelize.org for more info.

website.description: Properties and options for the website.

url.description: The link to the bot's website.

privacyPolicyUrl.description: The link to the bot's privacy policy.

tosUrl.description: The link to the bot's terms of service.

discordUrl.description: The link to the bot's support Discord server.

dev.description: Properties and options for the development bot. These are not used in production. Used for testing and debugging purposes.

devServerId.description: The ID of the development server (where to register dev commands)

assetsDirectory.description: The directory thats stores assets. Interpreted relatively depending on the module that is reading it. CURRENTLY UNUSED

news.description: Properties and options for news sending. WIP feature, used but not fully implemented.

endpoints.description: Properties and options for news endpoints.

relationChanges.description: Array of endpoints to send to when a relation between guilds changes.

enabled.description: Whether to enable adverts or not. If false, adverts are not shown at all.

adChance.description: The percentage chance (0-1) for an advert to be shown when it is eligible to be shown. Defaults to 1 (always show).

list.description: Array of adverts to show in various places.

name.description: Name of the advert. Used for internal identification only.

content.description: The content of the advert. Can be markdown.

link.description: The link the advert points to (URL).

linkText.description: The text to display on the link button. Optional. If not provided, defaults to 'Learn More'.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the advert's image. Optional.

colour.description: The associated colour of the advert in one of Discord's colour options. Optional.

games.description: Array of game names that this advert is relevant to. Optional. If not provided, the advert is shown for all games.

weight.description: The weight of the advert. Higher weights make the advert more likely to be selected.

roblox.description: Properties and options for Roblox integration.

rover.description: Properties and options for Rover integration.

token.description: A Rover token for Roblox integration. Used for authenticating with the Rover API. Optional, but required for any Rover features to work.

baseApiUrl.description: The base URL for the Rover API.
